---
title: Sensitivities of zonal mean atmospheric circulation to SST warming in an aqua-planet
  model
pagetitle: 2010-6-1-Chen2010 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2010
author: Gang Chen, R. Alan Plumb and Jian Lu
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 37, L12701, doi:10.1029/2010GL043473.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen, R. Alan Plumb and Jian Lu, 2010: Sensitivities of
  zonal mean atmospheric circulation to SST warming in an aqua-planet model, <i>Geophysical
  Research Letters</i>, 37, L12701, doi:10.1029/2010GL043473.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1029/2010GL043473
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Sensitivities of zonal mean atmospheric circulation to SST warming in an aqua-planet model

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2010*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen, R. Alan Plumb and Jian Lu, 2010: Sensitivities of zonal mean atmospheric circulation to SST warming in an aqua-planet model, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 37, L12701, doi:10.1029/2010GL043473.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1029/2010GL043473){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
